research.description: Reading docs, exploring the codebase, or searching the web to learn before acting

analysis.description: Diagnosing a problem, profiling behavior, or characterizing a system
examples: trace the data flow for X

generation.description: Writing new code, tests, configuration, or documentation from scratch
examples: write a function that does X

review.description: Reviewing existing work — docs, designs, or diffs — for correctness or fit

code_review.description: Reviewing code specifically for correctness, style, or architectural fit

refactor.description: Restructuring existing code without changing observable behavior

planning.description: Producing a plan, roadmap, design doc, or task breakdown

debugging.description: Reproducing and fixing a defect or unexpected behavior
